overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets. The player navigates through narrow alleys and open plazas surrounded by towering futuristic buildings with vibrant holographic advertisements and neon signage, encountering various NPCs and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial alley with shopfronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alley lined with pink neon-lit shops and cyberpunk storefronts

entered.detail: building facade with bright pink neon strip lighting running vertically along the left side of the street
futuristic commercial storefronts with glowing windows and signage on the right side
distant pink neon signs illuminating the end of the alley
scattered trash and litter covering the asphalt street surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley bathed in pink and cyan neon light. The player walks forward past shopfronts on the right and a building with prominent pink neon trim on the left. The street is littered with debris, and the sky is mostly obscured by towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with neon commercial signs and pedestrian plaza

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider intersection area with more open sky and pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busier pedestrian area, turning slightly right toward a commercial intersection with a prominent SOFTSYS sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket standing near the SOFTSYS storefront

entered.detail: large cyan-green neon sign reading 'SOFTSYS' mounted on a building facade
tall digital billboards and holographic displays visible above the intersection
open paved area where multiple pedestrian paths converge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley into a wider urban intersection. The prominent cyan 'SOFTSYS' neon sign dominates the right side while holographic billboards tower in the distance. Pedestrian density increases as the player navigates the concrete plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers

events.description: enters open plaza area with towering cylindrical buildings and massive holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza while passing various pedestrians, approaching a large green holographic advertisement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue robe walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive green holographic billboard displaying an abstract face or figure
tall cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated windows rising prominently in the background
raised pedestrian bridge or monorail track crossing above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a massive green holographic face on the left and a distinctive cylindrical tower in the distance. The player follows a pedestrian in a blue robe while walking on concrete pavement. Elevated walkways crisscross above, and the environment feels more open with partial sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with active vehicle traffic and commercial buildings

events.description: brief blackout transition occurs, changing the scene location
crossing a street with moving vehicles including a green sports car and armored SUV passing by

agents.ego_description: crossing a street with yellow zebra stripes, waiting for vehicles to pass before continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past the crosswalk followed by a camouflaged armored SUV

entered.detail: multi-story building with blue and red facade featuring large windows and air conditioning units
painted yellow zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road surface
tall pole with traffic signals showing green walk indicator

segments.scene_description: Following a brief blackout, the player finds themselves at a street crossing with yellow zebra stripes. Vehicles including a green sports car and armored SUV drive past as the player waits and then crosses. A blue commercial building dominates the right side of the frame, and traffic lights are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with orange support structures

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk following a large male NPC, passing under an elevated highway structure with orange beams

notable_agents.action: large male NPC wearing a white vest with black X symbol walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: large concrete and metal highway structure running overhead with orange support beams
bright orange structural beams supporting the elevated highway above the sidewalk
tall building facade with distinctive red horizontal stripes and ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sidewalk beneath an imposing elevated highway with bright orange support beams. Following a large NPC in a distinctive white vest, the player moves past a building with red horizontal accents on the left. The sky is mostly blocked by the overpass structure, and the lighting is predominantly artificial.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side alley with distinctive round window building

events.description: turns right into a narrower side street away from the main road

agents.ego_description: turning right into a narrower alleyway, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction

entered.detail: distinctive blue building facade with three large circular porthole-style windows
entrance to a darker narrow passage between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrower, darker alleyway. A distinctive blue building with large round porthole windows dominates the right side. The elevated highway and orange beams are left behind as the player enters a more enclosed space with lower lighting levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a vast, open urban plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow passage bathed in pink and cyan light, passing debris-strewn shopfronts beneath a sky obscured by towering architecture. As the camera moves forward, the alley opens into a wider intersection where a prominent cyan SOFTSYS sign dominates the view and pedestrian traffic increases. The scene then expands further into a spacious concrete plaza, shifting from the tight confines of the street to an open environment featuring elevated walkways and a massive green holographic face. Finally, the camera follows a figure in a blue robe toward a distant cylindrical tower under a partially visible night sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, bustling city crossing into the claustrophobic depths of a dark urban alley. It begins at a zebra-striped street crossing where a green sports car and armored SUV pass by a towering blue commercial building. As the player moves forward, the open street gives way to a sidewalk beneath an imposing elevated highway, where the sky is obscured by massive orange support beams and artificial light. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, leaving the highway structure behind to enter a narrower, dimmer alleyway. This transition concludes as the environment becomes more enclosed, dominated by a blue building featuring distinctive round porthole windows.
